title: Lapeirousia viridis

It is native to South Africa, and its classification within the plant kingdom is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Monocots, order Asparagales, family Iridaceae, genus Lapeirousia, and species L. viridis. This classification places Lapeirousia viridis within the group of monocot flowering plants that are commonly known as irises. The family Iridaceae includes a diverse range of flowering plants that are found in various parts of the world.
